ideas.title: Wholesaler Intelligence Network
ideas.summary: Use the productivity tool as a Trojan horse for building a data monopoly on distribution intelligence. Phase 2 sells to wholesalers ($99-299/mo), Phase 2.5 aggregates distribution intelligence data, Phase 3 sells anonymized intelligence back to asset managers ($50K-500K/yr).

ideas.title: FRED API Integration (Quick Win)
ideas.summary: Free API, self-service, ~2 hours to wire. Enables daily market context (10Y yield, BBB spreads, mortgage rates). Key series: DGS10, BAMLC0A4CBBB, MORTGAGE30US.

ideas.title: Sports Handicapping Model (Parallel Revenue)
ideas.summary: Build model framework while football season is months away. Historical data backtesting. Diversified revenue stream independent of Angel Oak.
